response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience with multiple programming languages and frameworks, but lacks the mandatory C++ development experience on Windows platforms (only ~1 year of C/C++ work at National Instruments). There is no evidence of SQL Server/Oracle expertise, and domain expertise in Fixed Income or Investment Banking is absent. The resume heavily emphasizes web/mobile/embedded systems and D/JavaScript/TypeScript, with no alignment to capital markets or fixed-income systems.
strengths: Strong background in full-stack development across multiple languages and platforms
Experience with low-latency systems and performance optimization (Dlang, Node.js)
Demonstrated ability to work in agile environments with CI/CD and testing practices
concerns: Insufficient C++ experience on Windows (only 1 year, not 5–10 years required)
No domain expertise in Fixed Income, Investment Banking, or Capital Markets
